info.name: Pioneer DDJ-FLX2
info.author: CupoMeridio, RaduTek
info.description: 2-deck USB and Bluetooth MIDI controller. This mapping implements a custom 4-deck layer mode, manual soft takeover for faders, and asymmetric shift functions.

control.description: Deck 1: Shift + Headphone: short press loads selected track, long press ejects
Deck 2: Shift + Headphone: cycle effects in the primary FX unit
Deck 1: Hold to enable permanent sync
Deck 2: Hold to enable permanent sync
Deck 1: Pad mode selection with Shift + Sync
Deck 2: Pad mode selection with Shift + Sync
Deck 2: Jog Platter rotation, vinyl off
Deck 1: Jog Platter rotation, vinyl off
Deck 1: Go to cue point and stop
Deck 2: Go to cue point and stop
Deck 2: Jog Wheel (outer ring - low sensitivity)
Deck 1: Jog Wheel (outer ring - low sensitivity)
Hotcue 1, Deck 1: Set, preview, jump to
Hotcue 2, Deck 1: Set, preview, jump to
Hotcue 3, Deck 1: Set, preview, jump to
Hotcue 4, Deck 1: Set, preview, jump to
Hotcue 5, Deck 1: Set, preview, jump to
Hotcue 6, Deck 1: Set, preview, jump to
Hotcue 7, Deck 1: Set, preview, jump to
Hotcue 8, Deck 1: Set, preview, jump to
Hotcue 1, Deck 2: Set, preview, jump to
Hotcue 2, Deck 2: Set, preview, jump to
Hotcue 3, Deck 2: Set, preview, jump to
Hotcue 4, Deck 2: Set, preview, jump to
Hotcue 5, Deck 2: Set, preview, jump to
Hotcue 6, Deck 2: Set, preview, jump to
Hotcue 7, Deck 2: Set, preview, jump to
Hotcue 8, Deck 2: Set, preview, jump to
